name: Knives of the Crone
inspire:
If Foretold Wisdom is foretold after a friendly fighter's successful Attack as a result of the Visions in the Blood ability, Inspire that fighter.

If Foretold Wisdom is foretold as a result of the prophecy roll at the start of the first Action step in a battle round, Inspire a friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Visions in the Blood
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack.
reactions.rulesText: Make a prophecy roll (see Rituals of Prophecy).

abilities.name: Rituals of Prophecy
abilities.rulesText:
At the start of the first Action step in each battle round, you can make a prophecy roll by rolling 4 Attack dice.

- If the roll contains 1 of the results on the prophecy table, that prophecy is foretold.
- If the roll contains 2 different results on the prophecy table, both of those prophecies are foretold.
- If the roll contains 3 of the same symbol, you can pick 1 prophecy from the prophecy table. That prophecy is foretold.
- If the roll contains 4 of the same symbol, you can pick 2 different prophecies from the prophecy table. Both of those prophecies are foretold.
- If the roll contains any {icon:skull}, you can replace each {icon:skull} with another symbol of your choice ({icon:crit}, {icon:fury}, {icon:grievous} or {icon:hex}).

When a prophecy is foretold, immediately use its ability.

Prophecy Table:

Result: {icon:crit}{icon:crit} - Foretold Slaughter: The next time you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack this battle round, that weapon has Cleave ({icon:cleave}) and Ensnare ({icon:ensnare}) for that Attack.

Result: {icon:fury}{icon:fury} - Foretold Wisdom: Look at the top card of your Objective deck. Put that card on the top or bottom of that deck.

Result: {icon:grievous}{icon:grievous} or {icon:hex}{icon:hex} or {icon:grievous}{icon:hex} - Foretold Protection: The next time you make a Save roll this battle round, you can immediately re-roll 1 Save dice in that Save roll.
